title: Classroom Of The Elite Custom GUI Pack
description: Classroom Of The Elite Custom GUI Pack
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/QC0Wdc4.png)** **It's GUI ONLY Resource pack** **so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.** **This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Classroom Of The Elite". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container. The palette that I choose is Red & Pink but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Yellow & white or any colors else.** **please tell me I will think about it!** **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** **Updated for 1.21** **Visual Updates Includes:** - Adding red boarders - New Pictures to containers - Coloring the Minecraft Logo [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/)~~~~ **Images** **Hud** **![](https://i.imgur.com/c6GXaN5.png)** **Settings** **![](https://i.imgur.com/lRieyBm.png)** **Creative Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/oTHAd7j.png)** **Crafting** **![](https://i.imgur.com/NNw4L7I.png)** **Anvil** **![](https://i.imgur.com/WbpAb1l.png)** **Furnace** **![](https://i.imgur.com/VF0p3ls.png)** **Shulker Box** **![](https://i.imgur.com/hUnCTdO.png)** ****Loom**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/rwIx4SL.png)**** ****Beacon Menu**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/fEdiwH5.png)**** ****Villagers**** ****Trading Menu**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/pKAY6vH.png)**** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
